creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Out of curiosity, I searched and did not find any flex/bison files in vte sources. 

Then I ran a test of building x11-toolkits/vte after removing the bison argument in the USE variable (having removed bison from my system beforehand) and it build and installed fine.

Fix: 

I guess we can remove the bison flag from vte port requirements.
How-To-Repeat: -
